name: Design Studio
description: Provides an IDE design-system surface for visually composing DESIGN.md systems as artifact-backed projects.

standards.name: Design Tokens Community Group Format Module

capabilities.description: Renders a visual design-system studio for DESIGN.md files.
Adds the Design Studio pane item when DESIGN.md is selected.
Exports visual design-system state to DESIGN.md.
Controls artifact-backed project autosave, collision handling, and DESIGN.md handoff defaults.

renderers.label: Design Studio
renderers.description: Interactive DESIGN.md design-system renderer and review workspace.

paneItem.label: Design Studio
paneItem.description: Open DESIGN.md in the Design Studio pane.

permissions.reason: Reads and writes Design Studio projects as standalone artifacts.
Reads existing DESIGN.md context for migrations without creating a separate design workspace drive.
